kind: independent second-implementation cross-check (from-scratch geometry vs the verifier's extracted terminal relation)
note: On every clip where the verifier extracts a terminal relation, an independent from-scratch reimplementation of the containment geometry reproduces it. Excluded: clips gate-rejected as occluded (no rollout to extract), and clips with no cube motion (the verifier's figure-ground step emits no relation — a motion decision, outside the geometry's scope).
